results.notes: Fastest raw throughput; base model only (no chat template)
Recommended for Mac vLLM CPU: instruct, multilingual, kind overlay default
Health timeout after 2400s; HF download + CPU load still in progress
Health timeout after 2400s; HF download + CPU load still in progress

recommendation.rationale: Only instruct model that loaded reliably within timeout. 3.6x slower than opt-125m but supports chat/instruct API and matches kind/cpu overlay default.

blockers: kind/kubectl not installed; used Docker directly
LFM2.5-350M and Qwen2.5-1.5B exceed 40min startup on unauthenticated HF Hub
vLLM 0.20 CPU image drops --device and --disable-log-requests CLI flags
